summary: Iteration 27 - Admin Procedures Dashboard Testing Complete. Backend: All 13 pytest tests passed (stats endpoint returns correct structure without null categories, chat actions CRUD works, reference data endpoints return categories/countries with flags, procedures list with filters works). Frontend: All 5 sidebar tabs functional (Tableau de bord, Procedures, Statistiques, Gestion des documents, Configuration). Dashboard shows stats cards (Total, Publiees, Brouillons, Vues) and recent procedures. Stats tab shows bar chart by category, grid by country with flags, and top viewed procedures. Documents tab shows files across all procedures. Configuration tab shows Chat Actions CRUD (add/edit/delete), Categories list, and Countries list with flags. 'Voir le site' sidebar link correctly points to /procedures. '+Creer' button in dashboard navigates to /admin/procedures/nouvelle. ProceduresPage shows '+ Nouvelle procedure' button for admin that links to /admin/procedures/nouvelle. Header dropdown has Procedures section with 'Tableau de bord' and 'Nouvelle procedure' links.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' - cosmetic hydration warning from React dev tools, does not affect functionality

backend_api: GET /api/procedures/stats - Returns total, published, drafts, active, total_files, total_chat_actions, total_views, by_category, by_country (no null values)
GET /api/chat-actions - Returns list with country_name and country_flag
POST /api/chat-actions - Creates chat action with title and country
GET /api/procedures - Returns paginated list with enriched data
GET /api/procedures/{id}/files - Returns file list for procedure
frontend_ui: Admin Dashboard (/admin/procedures) - Sidebar with 5 tabs: Tableau de bord, Procedures, Statistiques, Gestion des documents, Configuration
Dashboard tab - Shows stats cards (Total procedures: 3, Publiees: 3, Brouillons: 0, Vues totales: 31, Actives: 3, Fichiers: 2, Chat Actions: 3)
Dashboard tab - Shows recent procedures list with country flags
Procedures tab - Shows full list with category and country filter dropdowns
Procedures tab - Each procedure row shows title, category, country with flag, steps count, views, status badges (PUBLIEE/BROUILLON, ACTIVE/INACTIVE)
Statistiques tab - Shows stats cards (Total, Publiees, Brouillons, Vues totales)
Statistiques tab - Shows bar chart 'Par categorie' with counts (Visa/Immigration: 1, Autre: 2)
Statistiques tab - Shows grid 'Par pays' with country flags (France: 1, Guinee: 1, Canada: 1)
Statistiques tab - Shows 'Les plus consultees' top viewed procedures with view counts
Documents tab - Shows all files across procedures (2 files: test_form.pdf, test_img.jpg) with download buttons
Configuration tab - Shows 'Actions de Chat (Assistant IA)' CRUD section
Configuration tab - New chat action input, country dropdown, and add button work correctly
Configuration tab - Shows Categories list (9 categories with IDs)
Configuration tab - Shows Countries list (16 countries with flags from flagcdn.com)
Sidebar 'Voir le site' link - Points to /procedures
'+ Creer' button in dashboard header - Navigates to /admin/procedures/nouvelle
ProceduresPage (/procedures) - Shows '+ Nouvelle procedure' button for admin user
'+ Nouvelle procedure' button - Has href /admin/procedures/nouvelle
Header dropdown - Shows 'PROCEDURES' section for admin users
Header dropdown - 'Tableau de bord' link navigates to /admin/procedures
Header dropdown - 'Nouvelle procedure' link navigates to /admin/procedures/nouvelle

critical_code_review_comments: AdminProceduresDashboard.js uses tab-based navigation (activeTab state) instead of separate routes - clean implementation
All 5 tabs render different content within the same page component - efficient SPA pattern
Stats endpoint properly aggregates data by category and country using MongoDB aggregation pipeline
Country flags loaded from flagcdn.com CDN using 2-letter country codes
Chat Actions CRUD properly integrated with /api/chat-actions endpoints
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Minor: Console hydration warnings about span in select/option - cosmetic, React dev tools artifact
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (3 procedures, 2 files, 3 chat actions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Procedures Dashboard fully tested. All 5 sidebar tabs work: Dashboard (stats + recent), Procedures (list + filters), Statistiques (charts + top viewed), Documents (files across all procedures), Configuration (Chat Actions CRUD + Categories + Countries). Login route is /connexion. Admin dashboard is at /admin/procedures. 'Voir le site' sidebar link goes to /procedures. '+' button in both dashboard header and ProceduresPage links to /admin/procedures/nouvelle. Header dropdown has Procedures section with 'Tableau de bord' and 'Nouvelle procedure' links.
